title: Acrobat AI Assistant
abstract: Acrobat AI Assistant is a RAG system that turns your documents into an interactive knowledge base. Upload files, ask questions, get answers with source citations. Adobe推出的Acrobat PDF文档AI助手
abstract_zh: 伙计们！你们有没有被堆积如山的文档搞蒙过？那得用上 Acrobat AI Assistant啦！它就像你的私人资料助手，能快速整理信息、提炼重点，简直就是写周报时的救星，调Bug时的得力帮手。再也不怕数据太多头大了，**Acrobat AI Assistant** 一出手，妥妥搞定！快给你的工作减负吧！
